verses.1: Many times they have afflicted me from my youth up.
verses.2: many times they have afflicted me from my youth up,
verses.3: The plowers plowed on my back.
verses.5: Let them be disappointed and turned backward,
verses.6: Let them be as the grass on the housetops,
verses.7: with which the reaper doesn’t fill his hand,
verses.8: Neither do those who go by say,
